insights: Facsimile/printed signatures are the strongest rejection signal (2/14 rejections = 14%)
Real snipes show extreme delta: confirmed autos avg 81.65% below market vs rejected listings overpriced/mismarked
Wrong player/wrong card metadata accounts for 4/14 rejections (29%) — title-content mismatch is critical
Novelty/custom/reprint cards rejected 100% of time; confirmed snipes are authentic vintage/modern base products
Confirmed autos are from mainstream graded sets (Topps Tribute, Authentic Images); rejected autos include oddball products (Leaf Exhibits MSIG, Merrick Mint gold)
Gold-variant cards (23kt gold, gold foil, gold edition) appear in 4 rejections but 0 confirmations
Price anomalies (too high relative to market) drove 1 wrong_market_price rejection; all real snipes are steep undercuts
Multi-player or incomplete set listings rejected; confirmed snipes are single-card, complete condition
